title: Podman Build use absolute filepath
body:
podman build always finds the abs path but was never using it for the containerFile path. This was causing the remote client to be given a relative path that does not exist. Switch to evaluating and using absolute paths only.

resolves #12841

Signed-off-by: cdoern <cdoern@redhat.com>

a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body: @baude this fixes the issue, let me know if this breaks any other use cases and I can reevaluate.
